structure_description: Categorization against a closed label set: records group document titles under the five specified cause-of-action categories based on evidence keywords (demolition, maritime, non-litigation execution, criminal compensation, labor/social security).

行政主体-劳动和社会保障行政管理（劳动，社会保障）
